purpose: Rewrites leaveGroup() to emit kind-13 leave-intent via sendRumorSafe and kind-9 fire-and-forget announcement before purging local state. mlsGroup.leave() is never called.

public_api.name: leaveGroup
public_api.description: Emits kind-13 sendRumorSafe (with unapplied-proposals retry), fire-and-forget kind-9 announcement, then runs the existing 8-step purge sequence and returns true. Navigation to /groups is performed by the caller (LeaveGroupButton).

events_emitted: kind-13 MLS application rumor (LEAVE_INTENT_KIND) — encrypted leave intent
kind-9 MLS application rumor — chat leave announcement (fire-and-forget)
test_targets: No new unit test file for leaveGroup (React context with extensive setup). Behavioral correctness verified by unit suite non-regression (856+ passing) and AC verification via code inspection.
